defect: A failed native aws ec2 start-instances command did not stop execution; the helper waited 80 polls for running and then threw before writing its evidence record.
fix: Capture start-instances output and exit code.
Catch execution exceptions so the helper can write fail-closed evidence.
Skip stop-instances when the instance is already stopped.
Carry the execution exception into the static-proof errors and failure category.
next_action: Commit the helper fix before any later capacity retry; do not rerun Normal in a capacity loop.
